calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court ordered Does 1 to 50 of First Amended Complaint dismissed. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Continued To Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Orestes Cross, Esq. (415-545-8394) for Plaintiff/Moving party .
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff reports a proof of service is on file. The Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:
